title: Introducing the new monday developer community hub

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,
I’m Omer Koort, the Developer Community Manager from the monday.com Marketplace team! I’m happy to launch our brand new community hub for developers and marketplace partners!

We’ve built this new hub to be the go-to place for everything related to developing on monday.com. Here’s what you can expect:

  • Product Updates: Stay up-to-date with the latest features and changes.
  • Feature Requests: Have an idea? Submit your feature requests and help shape the future of monday.com apps framework and API.
  • Community Events: Find all our webinars, workshops, and other community events in one central location.
  • Dedicated Categories: Get answers to all your questions about monday apps development and the monday GraphQL API.

Whether you’re interested in learning more about building monday apps, submitting your first app to the monday marketplace, or just need to ask a quick question, this is the place for you!

Join the new community hub here

*Important Note for Existing Users: If you previously had an account on our old developers community, please reset your password first to access the new hub

Looking forward to seeing you there!

posts.author: HuwenArnone (Huwen Arnone)
posts.cookedHtml: Huwen Arnone Petrovich reacted to your message:

posts.author: HuwenArnone (Huwen Arnone)
posts.cookedHtml: Love seeing the community getting the space it deserves! Thanks to you and the team for making this happen. Count me in to help shape the conversations!
